title: Guard gitWorktree.Create same-cycle reuse against a committed salvage snapshot becoming the normalize base
notes: ADR-0076 slice C architect finding #3 (LOW): slice C changed preserved-worktree state from dirty to committed. If Create (not CreateFrom) ever reuses a preserved worktree for the SAME cycle number (resume/reset edge), ensureCleanWorktree sees clean HEAD=snapshot and WorktreeBaseSHA becomes the snapshot, so normalizeWorktreeToBase will not re-expose the salvaged work for audit. Cycle numbers are not normally reused, but add a guard: on Create reuse, detect a salvage-snapshot HEAD (commit subject marker 'salvage snapshot (ADR-0076 continuation-on-fail)') and record base as the snapshot's first non-salvage ancestor, or WARN loudly.
